summary: Agent2 determined option D ("inlay wax") as it isn't traditionally employed for forming an indirect wax pattern; instead, other types like ivory, modeling, and utility waxes are standard choices in this process. The conclusion was reached by understanding which materials serve specific roles within dental procedures related to indirect patterning versus those serving distinct functions such as cavity preparation. \boxed{D}
